headline: Invesco Supports U.S. Government Commitment to Long-Term Investment Opportunity for Children
summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm, announced today its support of the U.S. government's new tax-advantaged child savings Section 530A Accounts, also known as Trump Accounts. Invesco is committing to match the government's $1,000 contribution to eligible newborns of its eligible U.S. employees, effectively doubling the initial account size. Invesco also intends to contribute to the accounts of other eligible children of its eligible U.S. employees.
